![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/2500x1600q2mcompound-1920x1152.webp)

# Q 

2 

M 

COMPOUND

## Exterior / Paint Correction

### High cut compound with clean work and reliable finish.

Q²M Compound is a cutting paste designed to deliver strong defect removal while maintaining a low dust level and a high quality finish. When used with correct technique and an eccentric polisher, it can also function as a one step solution.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2016/10/productmain_1700x1645px_q2mcompound_120_1000_2024-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## A cutting compound with very low dust and a great finish.

Q²M Compound balances cutting power and finish quality, helping reduce the need for multiple polishing steps. Its water based formula supports clean work and easy residue removal.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons37.svg)

LOW DUST 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons46.svg)

NO SILICONES 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons42.svg)

NO FILLERS 

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2mcompound.webp)

CAPACITIES 

120 ML / 1000 ML

Cut 

Finish 

Consumption

15-40ML/PANEL

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

M 

COMPOUND

01
Apply a small amount of Q²M Compound to a matching polishing pad. 

02
Work the product with an eccentric polisher using proper technique. 

03
Continue polishing until defects are reduced and the product is worked through. 

04
Wipe off residue with a clean microfibre towel. 

05
Follow with a finishing polish if required. 

### Watch
product
video

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
What type of defects does Q²M Compound remove? 

It is designed for scratch and defect removal during paint correction.

02
Does it produce a lot of dust? 

No. It is formulated to keep dust to a minimum.

03
Can it be used as a one step product? 

Yes, when used correctly with an eccentric polisher.

04
Does it contain fillers or silicone? 

No. It is filler free and silicone free.

05
Is it suitable before coating application? 

Yes. It leaves a clean surface suitable for coating preparation.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/360000260717-Q-M-Compound)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
